description: Structure a flight-data-monitoring (FDM/FOQA) INFORMED safety analysis from the exceedance and event summaries the user supplies — frame the findings, the trends, and the SMS actions per the ICAO Annex 19 Safety Assurance pillar. It does NOT ingest or analyse raw flight data and does NOT invent exceedance counts or values; absent data is recorded as [GAP] and routed to the competent FDM team. Use this skill to structure an FDM/FOQA-informed analysis for a named operator from summaries the user provides. Grounds in KB-STD-ICAO-ANNEX19, traces every finding to a supplied summary item, reaches systemic SMS actions, and is explicitly assistive. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: aviation-fdm-foqa-analysis
